title: 知名惡意起香港示威者個人資料的網站「香港解密」又翻生
meta_description: 知名惡意起香港示威者個人資料的網站「香港解密」又翻生 - 知名惡意起香港示威者個人資料的網站「香港解密」又翻生  要下架該網站 就要向GoDaddy投訴該網站濫用服務  GoDaddy有得回報content abuse  https://supportcenter.godaddy.com/abusereport ...
meta_keywords: 知名,惡意起,香港,示威者,個人,資料,網站,解密,又翻生
contents:
知名惡意起香港示威者個人資料的網站「香港解密」又翻生
要下架該網站 就要向GoDaddy投訴該網站濫用服務

GoDaddy有得回報content abuse

https://supportcenter.godaddy.com/abusereport

拉落去揀「Inappropriate Content」



名 聯絡email （可以唔填）





第一項填個仆街網個domain
hk-protest.com

第二項填個網址
www.hk-protest.com

第三項咁填
HK-PROTEST.COM disseminates selective and potentially misleading information about the Hong Kong protests. The website magnifies violent incidents while overlooking peaceful demonstrations and the core demands of protesters. By doing so, it may mislead viewers, influencing incorrect perceptions of the entire protest movement and undermining the significance of peaceful advocacy. Furthermore, it recently suffered a significant personal data breach, jeopardizing users' privacy. Such actions pose a risk of persecution by a totalitarian government and contravene ethical and responsible web hosting principles, raising grave concerns regarding its content and potential consequences for those involved in the Hong Kong protests.

之後Submit就OK




用Email投訴：

寄去：abuse@godaddy.com
主題：Complaint Regarding Personal Data Breach on HK-PROTEST.COM
內容：
Dear GoDaddy Support Team,

I hope this message finds you well. I am writing to urgently request the immediate cessation of domain hosting services for the website HK-PROTEST.COM due to several pressing concerns: a personal data breach, the dissemination of misleading content, and the potential risks it poses to those involved in the Hong Kong protests.

Personal Data Breach: HK-PROTEST.COM has recently been involved in a significant personal data breach, exposing users' sensitive information, including names, email addresses, and potentially more confidential data. This breach poses a severe risk to users and their privacy.

Dissemination of Misleading Content: The website selectively showcases violent incidents, magnifying them, while disregarding the peaceful demonstrations and the core demands of the protesters. This approach has the potential to mislead viewers and shape incorrect perceptions of the entire protest movement, effectively undermining the importance of peaceful protest and the genuine concerns of the protesters.

Risk of Persecution: The deliberate dissemination of misleading information and the potential for public misinformation poses a grave risk to those involved in the Hong Kong protests. Such actions may lead to persecution by a totalitarian government, with serious consequences for individuals who are fighting for their rights and freedom.

Hosting a website that both experiences a personal data breach, spreads misleading information, and risks the persecution of individuals involved in a legitimate protest movement is a matter of utmost concern. It goes against principles of ethical and responsible web hosting, as well as humanitarian and human rights considerations.

Considering these multifaceted concerns, I kindly request that GoDaddy take the following actions:

Immediate Suspension: Suspend hosting services for HK-PROTEST.COM to prevent further data breaches, the dissemination of misleading information, and the potential risks to individuals involved in the Hong Kong protests.

Investigation: Conduct a thorough investigation into the activities and security practices of HK-PROTEST.COM to address the data breach and review the content to ensure it complies with your terms of service.

Communication: Inform me of the steps you have taken to address this matter, and confirm when hosting services for this website have been suspended.

It is crucial to address these issues promptly, as continued hosting of HK-PROTEST.COM may have serious consequences for individuals who are standing up for their rights and freedom in challenging circumstances.

I appreciate your immediate attention to this matter and request prompt action to uphold ethical hosting standards and protect the well-being of those involved in the Hong Kong protests.

Thank you for your consideration and assistance in addressing this critical issue.

Sincerely,




如果有其他嘢都想投訴埋或者想寫得唔同啲

可以嘅話向埋Google Report
